---
title: "Analyzing US Births and Basketball Recruits"
author: "Leo Katz"
format: html
execute:
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```
```{r}
#| cache: true
births_tibble <- read_excel("data/us_births_1994_2014.xlsx") |>
  mutate(day_of_week = factor(
    day_of_week,
    levels = c("Sun", "Mon", "Tues", "Wed", "Thurs", "Fri", "Sat"),
    ordered = TRUE
  ))

glimpse(births_tibble)
```

```{r}
births_tibble |>
  group_by(month, date_of_month) |>
  summarize(avg_births = mean(births), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date_of_month, y = month, fill = avg_births)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.name) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:31, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", label = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Average US Births by Month and Day (1994-2014)",
    x = "Day of Month",
    y = "Month",
    fill = "Average Births"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm")
  )
```

```{r}
christmas_data <- births_tibble |>
  filter(month == 12) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    dec_25_births = births[date_of_month == 25],
    surrounding_avg_births = mean(births[date_of_month %in% c(20:24, 27:30)]),
    pct_of_baseline = (dec_25_births / surrounding_avg_births) * 100,
    day_of_week = day_of_week[date_of_month == 25],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

christmas_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = pct_of_baseline)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2c3e50", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = day_of_week), size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1994, 2014, by = 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    title = "December 25 Births as a Percentage of Surrounding Days",
    subtitle = "Baseline calculated as the mean of births on December 20-24 and December 27-30",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Percentage of Surrounding Days Baseline",
    color = "Day of Week"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

```{r}
births_model <- lm(births ~ factor(year) + factor(month) + day_of_week, data = births_tibble)
summary(births_model)$r.squared
```

```{r}
births_adjusted <- births_tibble |>
  mutate(pct_resid = (residuals(births_model) / mean(births)) * 100)

glimpse(births_adjusted)
```

```{r}
calendar_resid <- births_adjusted |>
  filter(!(month == 2 & date_of_month == 29)) |>
  group_by(month, date_of_month) |>
  summarize(mean_pct_resid = mean(pct_resid), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(2001, month, date_of_month, sep = "-")))

calendar_resid
```

```{r}
calendar_resid |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = mean_pct_resid)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2c3e50", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#e74c3c", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = as.Date("2001-01-01"), y = -26, label = "New Year's Day", size = 3, color = "#c0392b", fontface = "bold", vjust = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = as.Date("2001-07-04"), y = -28, label = "July 4th", size = 3, color = "#c0392b", fontface = "bold", vjust = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = as.Date("2001-10-31"), y = -14, label = "Halloween", size = 3, color = "#c0392b", fontface = "bold", vjust = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = as.Date("2001-12-25"), y = -41, label = "Christmas Day", size = 3, color = "#c0392b", fontface = "bold", vjust = 1) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b", expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Daily US Birth Deviation from Baseline (1994-2014)",
    subtitle = "Calculated as mean percentage residual from births_model (adjusting for year, month, and weekday trends)",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Deviation from Baseline"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )
```
```{r}
#| cache: true
basketball_tibble <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    tier = factor(
      tier,
      levels = c("Never played", "Brief career", "Solid career", "All-Star level", "Superstar")
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    recruit_group = factor(
      recruit_group,
      levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100")
    )
  )

glimpse(basketball_tibble)
```

```{r}
basketball_tibble |>
  filter(!is.na(rank), !is.na(top_mean_wa)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rank, y = top_mean_wa)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = tier), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = ifelse(name %in% c("LeBron James", "Draymond Green", "Chris Paul", "Donnell Harvey"), name, ""),
      hjust = ifelse(rank > 50, 1.1, -0.1)
    ),
    size = 3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "High School Recruit Rank vs. Career NBA Performance",
    subtitle = "Relationship between recruit rank (1-100) and career Wins Above Average (top_mean_wa)",
    x = "Recruit Rank (1 = Top Recruit)",
    y = "Career Wins Above Average",
    color = "Career Success Tier"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
